name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrMcareEvtExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE_EVT AS (SELECT EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_SK, COALESCE(CD_S.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, EVT.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD_SK, EVT.EFF_DT_SK, EVT.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, EVT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, EVT.MBR_SK, EVT.TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MCARE_EVT EVT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_MBR_DM_DRVR DRVR ON EVT.MBR_UNIQ_KEY=DRVR.KEY_VAL_INT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD_S ON EVT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD_S.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_SK NOT IN(0,1)), CTE_MCARE AS (SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK, COALESCE(TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD, COALESCE(TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG), CTE_OUT AS (SELECT CTE_EVT.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CTE_EVT.EFF_DT_SK, CTE_EVT.MBR_SK, CTE_EVT.TERM_DT_SK, CTE_EVT.SRC_SYS_CD, COALESCE(CTE_MCARE.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD, COALESCE(CTE_MCARE.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM FROM CTE_EVT LEFT JOIN CTE_MCARE ON CTE_EVT.MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD_SK=CTE_MCARE.CD_MPPNG_SK), CTE_TF AS (SELECT CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(EFF_DT_SK)))=0 OR EFF_DT_SK IS NULL OR RTRIM(LTRIM(EFF_DT_SK)) IN('UNK','NA') THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE EFF_DT_SK END AS svDefaultEffDate, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(TERM_DT_SK)))=0 OR TERM_DT_SK IS NULL OR RTRIM(LTRIM(TERM_DT_SK)) IN('UNK','NA') THEN '2199-12-31' ELSE TERM_DT_SK END AS svDefaultTermDt, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, EFF_DT_SK, MBR_SK, TERM_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD, MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM FROM CTE_OUT), FINAL AS (SELECT CASE WHEN SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD END AS MBR_MCARE_EVT_CD, CONVERT(DATETIME,svDefaultEffDate,120) AS EFF_DT, MBR_SK, CONVERT(DATETIME,svDefaultTermDt,120) AS TERM_DT, CASE WHEN MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM END AS MBR_MCARE_EVT_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM CTE_TF) SELECT * FROM FINAL

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS and pulls to the Data Marts.  Perform no changes with the data.

Annotations:
Read from source table MBR_MCARE_EVT  from IDS.
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrMcareEvtExtr
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Write MBRSHP_DM_MCARE_EVT Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmMbrshpDmMbrMcareEvtLoad.
Code SK lookups for Denormalization
